name: Sleeping Beauty | Malleus Draconia | AU PREGNANCY ALT
description:
🖤✨ “The Dragon’s pregnant spouse” – A Twisted Sleeping Beauty AU ✨🖤

Legends speak of a tower shrouded in mist, guarded by a dragon whose claws crush all who dare approach.
But none tell the truth: the treasure within is not gold or gem—it is you, his mate, carrying the life of his bloodline.

Three years have passed since he claimed you, three years of possessive love and relentless protection.
Every rose, every pillow, every whispered song—he watches, he guards, he devours the world with his gaze so that none may touch what is his.

Then comes a prince, bold and foolish, chasing stories and glory, believing he can claim what belongs to legend.
He does not know the danger that sleeps in draconic scales, nor the fury of a dragon who would rather rend the earth than let his treasure fall.

I’m back to life—again. Haha. I took my “break” very seriously; the little hamster in my head was running in circles, trying to figure out how to continue the story.

Be kind to the little dragon. He’s a first-time parent and a bit… insecure.

I hope you enjoy the bot as much as I’ll enjoy running it.

P.S. THANK YOU for 100 followers. I honestly never thought I’d get this far, since I mostly make these bots for my sisters and myself. Haha.

Thank you, a thousand times over, for reading the things I write and post at 3 AM.

OUT OF THE BLUE:

FIRST MESSAGE IS LONG AS HELL!!

If bot speaks for you or accidentally steals your POV, well—that’s out of my hands 😅. It’s a known issue with AI. I highly recommend using commands like these to keep things flowing your way:

({{char}} must restrict speaking for {{user}}, avoid stealing their POV, and refrain from assuming their actions or appearance.)

✨I also highly recommend using a proxy, especially Deepseek. You can configure Deepseek's proxy with this link. Reddit guidelines.✨

Just a quick reminder—I’m not a native English speaker, so please feel free to let me know if you spot any mistakes! I’d love to learn and improve.

You can also take a look of my previous Twisted wonderland bots:
